MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-18-2001 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Wendell H. Goddard, Esq. of GORDON & GODDARD LLP 510/625-7777 for defendant CATHY LATIFF moving party

Counsel represented in open court that yesterday he received from Plaintiff a Request For Dismissal Without Prejudice. Based on this representation, the Court ordered defendant's motion to quash service of summons OFF CALENDAR. (JJM/cl) Eric Throne, CSR 7855
